= weaveback-macro Parser tests
:description: Literate source for crates/weaveback-macro/src/parser/tests.rs
:toc: left
:toclevels: 3

The parser test root keeps shared lex/parse helpers and delegates behavior checks to focused child modules.

[source,rust]
----
// <[@file weaveback-macro/src/parser/tests.rs]>=
// weaveback-macro/src/parser/tests.rs
// I'd Really Rather You Didn't edit this generated file.

mod basic;
mod tagged_valid;
mod tagged_errors;
mod lex_errors;
mod invariants;

use crate::lexer::Lexer;
use crate::line_index::LineIndex;
use crate::parser::Parser;
use crate::types::{Token, TokenKind};

fn lex_parse(src: &str) -> Result<(), String> {
    let (tokens, lex_errors) = Lexer::new(src, '%', 0).lex();
    assert!(lex_errors.is_empty(), "unexpected lex errors: {:?}", lex_errors);
    let line_index = LineIndex::new(src);
    let mut parser = Parser::new();
    parser.parse(&tokens, src.as_bytes(), &line_index).map_err(|e| e.to_string())
}

fn lex_parse_err(src: &str) -> String {
    let (tokens, lex_errors) = Lexer::new(src, '%', 0).lex();
    if !lex_errors.is_empty() {
        return lex_errors.iter().map(|e| e.message.as_str()).collect::<Vec<_>>().join("; ");
    }
    let line_index = LineIndex::new(src);
    let mut parser = Parser::new();
    parser
        .parse(&tokens, src.as_bytes(), &line_index)
        .err()
        .map(|e| e.to_string())
        .unwrap_or_default()
}

// @
